name: Gloss Broth
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Arrowroot starch or cornstarch dissolved in 1 tablespoon of vegetable stock (slurry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the slurry in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Stir in the starch slurry and cook until thickened, less than 1 minute.
